news.description: Anthropic announced today that its Claude Code and Claude Cowork tools are being updated to accomplish tasks using your computer. The latest update will see these AI resources become capable of opening files, using the browser and running dev tools. https://w…

news.title: Nvidia opens server racks to rival chips, expanding cloud infrastructure role
news.description: Nvidia is expanding its role in artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure by designing server racks that can accommodate processors from its competitors, according to a report by The Information, citing people familiar with the matter.

news.title: Anthropic’s Claude gets computer use capabilities in preview
news.description: Anthropic PBC wants users to give Claude the keys to their computer. It has just announced new “computer use” functionality for its artificial intelligence assistant, which can now click, scroll and navigate through web pages and applications to complete task…

news.title: Govt to rejig PLI 2.0 sops on high GPU prices, AI server tech
news.description: The terms of the production-linked incentive (PLI) scheme for IT hardware need to be re-evaluated due to the rising cost of graphics processing units (GPUs) and the emergence of artificial intelligence (AI) servers, a senior government official said on Monday.

news.title: Claude Cowork: How Anthropic’s New AI Agent Automates Your Mac or PC
news.description: Anthropic has introduced a new research preview called Claude Cowork, a tool designed to handle complex, recurring tasks across both desktop and mobile platforms. The new system allows the AI to interact directly with your Mac to open apps, fill spreadsheets,…

news.title: Protesters Rally Outside OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI Offices Over Industry Concerns
news.description: Protesters marched between the San Francisco offices of major AI developers, calling for a pause in the development of more powerful AI systems.

news.title: Phonak AI-Powered Hearing Aids Recognized with 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards

news.title: How to Build a Local AI Chatbot Using Open Source LLMs Without OpenAI API
news.description: Build your own local AI chatbot using open-source LLMs! This guide provides a step-by-step approach, covering setup with Ollama, LangChain, and Streamlit. Enjoy privacy and cost savings!

news.title: OpenAI warns Microsoft could be a ‘risk factor’ in its business ahead of potential IPO: Report
news.description: OpenAI said that the operating results of the AI company will depend on whether it can successfully establish relationships with additional partners other than Microsoft. However, a glitch in the Microsoft ties could jeopardise its business.

news.title: Kentucky Woman Rejects $26 Million To Turn Her Family’s Farm Into AI Data Center

news.title: Walmart Shuts Down Agentic Commerce With OpenAI
news.description: Walmart is pulling back from OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature inside ChatGPT after internal data showed conversion rates were roughly three times lower than transactions completed on its own website, as reported by Wired. The shift marks an early stress test…

news.title: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT Library to store your personal files
news.description: OpenAI is rolling out a new feature called 'Library' for ChatGPT, which allows you to store your personal files or images on OpenAI's cloud storage, so you can reference those items in a future chat. [...]
